svg.title: Enrichment layer detail
svg.desc: enrich() sends each source IP to geo.py for coordinates and threatintel.py for a severity score; both use caching and external services, then merge into the enriched event broadcast over the WebSocket.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does enrich() do per event?')
sendPrompt('How does the public-IP gate and cache work?')
sendPrompt('When is GeoLite2 used vs ip-api?')
sendPrompt('How does the ip-api rate-limit backoff work?')
sendPrompt('What is the local heuristic and Tor list for?')
sendPrompt('What fields are in the enriched event?')
